/usr/bin/c++   -fPIC -g -O3 -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -Xlinker -undefined -Xlinker dynamic_lookup -o libgame.dylib -install_name @rpath/libgame.dylib CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/cmake/backtrace.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/cmake/file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/misc/perlin.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/misc/hungarian.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/gametask.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/gamedefines.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/defines.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/ai.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/game_env.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/ai/ai_keyboard.cpp.o   -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib libgamelib.a libmenulib.a libdatalib.a libblunted2.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_filesystem.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_thread.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_python314.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL2_image.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL2_ttf.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libSDL2_gfx.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.10/lib/libSDL2.dylib -framework OpenGL -framework OpenGL /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_chrono.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_atomic.dylib
